Meta acquires robotics company Assured Robot Intelligence to help build humanoid technology
snippet: Meta has acquired Assured Robot Intelligence, a startup specialising in AI models for robots, to bolster its humanoid technology initiative. The acquired team will join Meta Superintelligence Labs, contributing expertise in robot control and self-learning for whole-body humanoid applications.

title: eGaming regulator takes charge, focuses on eSports registrations
snippet: India's new Online Gaming Authority of India is now operational. Its immediate focus is registering eSports companies and resolving player complaints. A digital portal is live for registrations. This move aims to regulate the growing online gaming sector and build public trust.
